tmc/cmem.h File Reference

Additional cmem ("common memory") APIs for tmc_shmem. More...


Defines

#define TMC_CMEM_DEFAULT_CAPACITY   (256 * 1024 * 1024)
 The default capacity for tmc_cmem_init(), used if a capacity of zero is requested.
#define TMC_CMEM_ALLOC_INIT
 A special "tmc_alloc_t" initializer that has the same effect as calling tmc_cmem_alloc_init() on a tmc_alloc_t.

Functions

int tmc_cmem_init (size_t capacity)
 Initialize cmem with at least the given "capacity" (maximum amount of memory that can be allocated), in bytes.
int tmc_cmem_close (void)
 Stop using any created (or inherited) cmem.
size_t tmc_cmem_get_capacity (void)
 Get the "capacity" of cmem.
size_t tmc_cmem_get_available (void)
 Get the maximum amount of cmem available for allocation.
int tmc_cmem_persist_after_exec (int flag)
 Set whether or not cmem should be available after exec().
int tmc_cmem_prepare_alloc (const tmc_alloc_t *alloc)
 Ensure that a suitable arena has been created.
tmc_alloc_t * tmc_cmem_alloc_init (tmc_alloc_t *alloc)
 Initialize a tmc_alloc_t so it allocates cmem.
void * tmc_cmem_malloc (size_t size)
 A version of "malloc()" using cmem.
void * tmc_cmem_calloc (size_t num, size_t size)
 A version of "calloc()" using cmem.
void * tmc_cmem_realloc (void *ptr, size_t size)
 A version of "realloc()" using cmem.
void * tmc_cmem_memalign (size_t boundary, size_t size)
 A version of "memalign()" using cmem.
void tmc_cmem_free (void *ptr)
 A version of "free()" using cmem.

Detailed Description

Additional cmem ("common memory") APIs for tmc_shmem.
